case_title: GOMEZ NICOLAS DBA ELIGOM INTERNATIONAL CONSTRUC. VS MOREAU KATIE C/O EAST BAY MUNI. UTIL. DIST.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,999.45 FILED BY GOMEZ NICOLAS DBA ELIGOM INTERNATIONAL CONSTRUC. AS TO DEFENDANT MOREAU KATIE C/O EAST BAY MUNI. UTIL. DIST. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ NICOLAS DBA ELIGOM INTERNATIONAL CONSTRUC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MOREAU KATIE C/O EAST BAY MUNI. UTIL. DIST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
